name: Leisure Valley
description: An 8-km green belt running through the heart of Chandigarh, linking themed gardens — from bougainvillea to hibiscus — creating a continuous urban parkland unlike any other Indian city.
history: Part of Le Corbusier's original city masterplan, designed as a continuous green lung stretching across the city. Houses multiple themed gardens and art installations.
famousFor: City-wide green corridor, themed gardens, and public art.
